frontmatter.title: Webhooks vs. APIs
frontmatter.description: I worked on implementing webhooks for clients while working at HomeX, so I figured it was a good idea to actually learn what a webhook is.

frontmatter.title: What the heck is an IIFE?
frontmatter.description: I overheard a coworker mention something called an 'iffy' during a meeting. Now I've come to the conclusion that immediately invoked function expressions (IIFEs) are pretty useful in JavaScript.
